intentionally_excluded_as_authority: v0.3 Python plotting examples unless duplicated and verified in the v0.4-dev checkout
key_verified_claims: v0.4-dev branch README says v0.4-dev is a retained scene/DRP2/native runtime branch, not a v0.3 Python plotting compatibility layer.

v0.4-dev include/datoviz/scene.h exposes panel domains, View2D policy, visible-domain readback, data-to-visual normalization, panel-owned axes, tick policy, labels, style, grid, units, and datetime hooks.
Datoviz v0.4-dev should be modeled as a native axis provider candidate, capability-gated and initially named WIP.
